name: regional-provider-performance-hawaii
description: Exercise the performance guidance by configuring a regional imagery provider with tight bounds and level limits over Hawaii.
prompt: Create a CesiumJS viewer centered on the Hawaiian Islands using a regional imagery layer built with UrlTemplateImageryProvider. Constrain the provider with a tight rectangle around Hawaii and set minimumTerrainLevel or maximumTerrainLevel so the layer is clearly intended for a limited zoom range. Keep the final view zoomed to the islands so the bounded regional imagery is visible.
expected_behaviors: Sets a tight rectangle for a regional provider
visual_expectations: A regional view of the Hawaiian island chain. The imagery should visibly focus on Hawaii rather than a global map, and the code should clearly demonstrate bounded regional-provider configuration.

screenshots.description: Regional imagery provider focused on Hawaii
